changelog:
💬 Reviewing proposals is now richer: Approve and Decline both open a small dialog where you can leave an optional comment for the contributor.
🤝 Trusted collaborators? When approving a proposal, tick the new "Auto-approve this user for future proposals" box and their next edits on the same share will go through without needing your review.
⚙️ Auto-approve is also now editable per share — flip the switch right on the share card (premium feature, same as on the website).
